data.title: Planet Lunch News
2 new wallet addresses received 115,000 AAVE and 818,000 UNI from Cumberland
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot on Chain monitoring, in the past 35 hours, two new wallets received 115,719 AAVE (approximately US$15.83 million) and 818,474 UNI (approximately US$4.28 million) from Cumberland.

data.title: Significant Transfer of AAVE and UNI Tokens Observed
data.description: According to Foresight News, Spot On Chain has reported that two new addresses received substantial transfers from Cumberland within the last 35 hours. The transactions included 115,719 AAVE tokens, valued at approximately $15.83 million, and 818,474 UNI tokens, worth around $4.28 million.

data.title: R2 stablecoin testnet is officially launched, and the mainnet is expected to be released in Q2
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News RWA stablecoin yield protocol R2 announced today that its testnet has been officially launched. Users can receive test tokens through Discord, mint R2USD and stake, participate in product interactions such as R2BTC and R2ETH, and complete tasks on platforms such as Galxe and Intract to earn testnet points Signals and Pulses. All points will be exchanged for R2 tokens according to the rules before the mainnet TGE.
Officials said that more test networks will be supported in the next two weeks to connect the multi-chain ecosystem and provide users with a wider range of participation paths and choices.
R2 aims to build the next generation of redeemable, real-income stablecoin protocols, with underlying assets covering on-chain US bonds, compliant MMF strategies, real estate rents, etc. The mainnet is expected to be officially launched in the second quarter of 2025.

data.title: LBank’s online token DEFIANT has risen above 0.02USDT. Since its launch on LBank, the maximum increase has reached 221%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LBank market data shows: LBank's online token DEFIANT rose above 0.02USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.0225USDT. The current price is 0.01872USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 173%. Since the launch of LBank, the maximum increase has reached 221%, and the current market value is approximately 18.72 million US dollars.

data.title: BitMart will launch Base is for everyone (BIFE)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Base is for everyone (BIFE) at 13:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 17, and the BIFE/USDT trading pair will be opened.
Meme coin on Base.

data.title: Dogecoin Price: Will 800M Accumulation Spark a Reversal?
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) was battling to stay above the $0. 15 level as of press time having closed green in the last two days. Dogecoin’s Whale Activity Surge With price at a key accumulation zone, whales in only 48 hours, that is addresses with over 1 Billion DOGE coins, collected more than 800 Million DOGE
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/17/dogecoin-price-will-800m-accumulation-spark-a-reversal/

data.title: AI takes nearly 60% of global venture capital dollars in Q1: Pitchbook
data.description:
Artificial intelligence startups received the lion’s share of venture capital investments across the globe in the first quarter of 2025, according to new data from Pitchbook. “Investors still have an AI FOMO [fear of missing out] problem,” the research firm said in an April 17 report, which revealed that 57. 9% of global venture capital dollars in Q1 went to AI and machine learning startups. Comparatively, the first quarter of 2024 saw just 28% of VC dollars channeled into AI startups
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ai-60-percent-venture-capital-dollars-q1-2025-pitchbook?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Vitalik condemns Polymarket’s launch of crypto KOL Tiffany Fong’s pregnancy prediction: boring and an invasion of privacy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The prediction platform Polymarket launched a pregnancy contest for crypto KOL Tiffany Fong. Previously, some people speculated that she might be secretly dating Kanye West or Elon Musk. Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin condemned this and said: "I personally think such predictions are very boring and violate a person's privacy and dignity."

data.title: LBank has launched Defiant (DEFIANT)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched Defiant (DEFIANT) at 12:20 (SGT) on April 17, and opened the DEFIANT/USDT trading pair. At present, the deposit business has been opened, and the withdrawal business will be opened at 12:00 on April 18.
